name: Seven Layer Tortilla Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 15 oz cans pinto beans, rinsed & drained
1 16 oz can black beans, rinsed & drained
2 cups light Cheddar, Monterey Jack or Mex. blend cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Mash the pinto beans and stir in 3/4 cup of picante sauce and garlic.
3. Mix the remaining 1/4 cup picante sauce with cilantro, black beans, and tomato.
4. Place one tortilla in a pie plate or tart dish. Spread 3/4 cup of pinto bean mixture over the tortilla, leaving 1/2 inch from the edge.
5. Top with 1/4 cup cheese.
6. Add another tortilla and 2/3 cup of black bean mixture and 1/4 cup cheese.
7. Repeat layers twice more.
8. Cover with remaining tortilla and spread with the rest of the pinto bean mixture and cheese.
9. Bake for about 40 minutes.
10. To serve, cut into wedges and serve with additional picante sauce and/or sour cream.
